prose: Fukui reactivity analysis on acrolein was performed using the chemkit fukui-reactivity skill with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', PySCF RKS, density-fitted), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file without re-optimization. N±1 states used charge ±1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges were computed via Mulliken (PySCF). The headline value reported is the largest f+ (electrophilic Fukui index) = 0.64232102, located on atom 4 (C, the β-carbon), identifying it as the most electrophilic site and dominant site for nucleophilic (Michael) addition. The oxygen (atom 1) is the most nucleophilic site (f- = 0.39388616). All integrity checks passed (sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000, schema_header ok). No warnings were reported by the engine. integrity.trustworthy = true.
